User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about a user including their role and subscription level.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user matching request.auth.uid

role.description: The system role of the user.

Document.title: Document Share
Document.description: Metadata for shared documents stored on Google Drive.

id.description: Unique identifier for the document entry in Firestore.

description.description: Brief description of the document contents.

category.description: Category folder structure (e.g. Science, Mathematics, History).

tags.description: Array of tags associated with the document.

driveUrl.description: The shareable view URL for the Google Drive viewer.

uploadedBy.description: User UID who uploaded the file.

uploadedByName.description: Display name of the user who uploaded the file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the document entry was created.

views.description: Number of views the document has received.

/users/{userId}.description: A user's profile configuration and preferences.

/documents/{documentId}.description: A catalog of shareable documents stored in Google Drive and searchable in Firestore.

/matangazo/{annId}.description: Announcements and news for the platform.
